name: Large Enterprise Regulated Industries (EU)
description: Large enterprises in regulated industries (financial services, healthcare, energy, public sector) with 2,000-100,000 employees and EUR 1B-100B revenue in the EU.

segmentation.vertical: Regulated Industries (Financial Services, Healthcare, Energy, Public Sector)

tam.description: EU cloud services in regulated industries
tam.source: IDC European Cloud Services Tracker 2025 — regulated industry verticals across the full EU account for approx. EUR 42B, same TAM as DACH market but broader geographic scope

sam.description: EU regulated enterprise sovereign and managed cloud
sam.source: Sovereign cloud and GDPR-compliant managed services are the addressable slice — estimated EUR 12B across EU27 for enterprises requiring data residency, NIS2 compliance, and European-operated infrastructure

som.description: 15 customers x EUR 4M ACV in 3 years
som.source: Bottom-up: EU expansion starting from Gaia-X partnerships and sovereign cloud positioning; ~500 qualifying enterprises outside DACH with sovereign cloud mandates; realistic reach is ~30 accounts via channel partners; 50% conversion = 15 customers; blended ACV EUR 4M (sovereign cloud hosting EUR 2M/yr + migration EUR 2M) = EUR 60M
